MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gillian. Steve Williams, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Anthony W. Belmonte and Defendant, Hamlet Mateo appeared in pro per. The matter settled per written stipulation of parties and not read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
